text_block_list.name: Academy Nurse
text_block_list.text:
You'll probably need to focus on rehabilitation for a while. I'll have a
car brought around to take you to the hospital, just in case.

text_block_list.name: Academy Nurse
text_block_list.text:
I know you're starting to train in earnest, but you're still growing.
Pushing yourself too hard will have immediate repercussions on your
body. You know that, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Academy Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Good. You'll be fine—with proper rehabilitation, you'll be training
again before you know it. But you have to take it easy for now, all
right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes ma'am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a training period, I spot Nishino Flower. She's putting more
weight on one leg; it's clear at a glance that she's injured.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer... You said I gave you courage... back then...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But... I...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With tears in her eyes, Nishino Flower flees.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shouldn't be running with that injured leg... Worried, I run after
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I chase after her tiny form in the distance. Finally, she stops.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before me is a breathtaking field of flowers, colorfully blooming as far
as the eye can see.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You came after me. I'm sorry for running away...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: This... is my favorite spot.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the flowers here always cheers me up. They make me feel
like I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even the smallest flowers fill me with courage. That's why... I want to
be just like them. That's why I come here.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to describe, but seeing you race gave me a burst of
confidence. It was really something, seeing our little treasure shine so
brightly.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. You gave us courage. There's no need to hide ourselves, to
make ourselves small—we should be holding our heads up high
instead.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The people I love told me that I gave them courage.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oho! If a decisive call is what you desire, then why don't we race again? And this time, I'll make sure there'll be zero doubts about the winner!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. When petals dance on the breeze, they sometimes obscure
one's view. I suppose, then, I have no choice but to become a gale.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was overwhelmed by the gap in our abilities, I still tried
to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But look, I only ended up hurting myself. I knew I was pushing myself
too hard, but I still...
choice_data_list: Why did you push yourself so hard?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm still a kid, but... Sniffle. I-if... Hiccup If I tried hard enough, I thought I could catch up with everybody. I... I...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wanted to... make my dream come true... Sob.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower sobs, her small shoulders shaking. Her frustration at
never being enough must have been building up for a while now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be easy to tell her that she doesn't need to "catch up" with
anyone. However, right now, the emotion that's bubbling up inside of
me is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sob. I... I'm... so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Nishino Flower again about how her actions cheered me up and
gave me hope.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's why she can—no, she will make her dream come true. She'll bloom as flowers do, bringing smiles to me and everyone else around her.
choice_data_list:
You're not ready to give up on your dream yet,
are you?

You're not ready to give up on your dream yet,
are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she had given up, she would never have come to this place. She
wouldn't have sought solace from the flowers.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: I want to help you achieve your dream.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I... I don't want to give up! No, I won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You said I gave you courage, right? Did you... really mean it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...! Thank you! I... I'll do my best, so... please...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Help me achieve my dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All smiles once more, Nishino Flower returns to the academy.
Tomorrow, we'll begin working together to make her dream a reality.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything. I can walk the rest of the way to class by
myself.
choice_data_list:
We should probably swing by the infirmary
first...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'll be fine going there on my own. Please, there's no need to
worry. I made you run after me, so I couldn't possibly ask you to do
more...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heeey, Flower. You on your way to the infirmary too? Hope there's enough beds for us both. I could use a nap. Yawn.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're going to sleep in the infirmary, Sky? That's unusual. On
clear days like today, you always nap outdoors...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a straight face, Seiun Sky claims she wants a change of pace,
but her gaze flicks briefly to Nishino Flower's leg.
choice_data_list: I guess you're in good hands.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whatever do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, wait up Sky!
I'll see you tomorrow, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky strolls away, waving a casual goodbye. Nishino Flower
slows down to match her pace. I watch them go, letting out a relieved
breath.
